nodes.label: AI as creative collaborator for story generation
nodes.label_negative: AI as insufficient for full story writing
nodes.grounding_span: I like working collaboratively with the AI chatbot to formulate the story line

nodes.label: AI reliability in producing desired story length
nodes.label_negative: AI inability to produce full-length stories
nodes.grounding_span: I initially tried asking the chatbots to write the full 4000 word story, and they just couldn't get anywhere close

nodes.label: AI adherence to tone and style requirements
nodes.label_negative: AI deviation from desired tone (e.g., abrupt endings)
nodes.grounding_span: They do tend to end quite abruptly

nodes.label: AI use transparency with audience
nodes.grounding_span: it is not something I advertise

nodes.label: AI as economic enabler for new creators
nodes.label_negative: Human writers as ideal but unaffordable
nodes.grounding_span: as a new creator with limited income, I cannot afford to hire writers

nodes.label: Creative expression and storytelling
nodes.grounding_span: Writing is something I have really enjoyed since being a child

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: The faster the story writing process is, the more I can focus on the other aspects

nodes.label: Community trust and acceptance
nodes.grounding_span: I do worry about the community being concerned about the use of AI

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI-assisted creative process
nodes.grounding_span: It surprised me how easy the process can actually be

nodes.label: Frustration with AI length limitations
nodes.grounding_span: it was so annoying not being able to get anything like what I wanted on the first try

nodes.label: Concern about community perception of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I do worry about the community being concerned about the use of AI

nodes.label: Aspiration to transition to human writers
nodes.grounding_span: I do eventually foresee no longer using AI to write my stories

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through thorough prompting and tweaking
nodes.grounding_span: I like to be as thorough as possible with my initial prompts, see what the chatbot provides, then tweak from there

nodes.label: Systematic decomposition of tasks into manageable sub-tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I ask the chatbot to write a plan for the story in 4 parts
